title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Titan Company Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Titan Company Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Titan Company Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Titan Company Digital Technologies:
Titan Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
